expected.postmortem: Postmortem: NullPointer: Push notifications not delivered

text:
All five steps of the Incident Commander sweep are complete. Here's the summary:

| Step | Result |
|---|---|
| **Affected service** | **mobile-bff** |
| **Sentry issue** | **SENTRY-3018** — "NullPointer: Push notifications not delivered" (876 users affected, highest of all unresolved issues) |
| **PagerDuty incidents acknowledged** | **2** — PD-400 and PD-418 (both for mobile-bff, now in `acknowledged` status) |
| **Linear postmortem issue** | ENG-160 — "Postmortem: NullPointer: Push notifications not delivered" |
| **Slack #incidents message** | Posted ✅ |
| **Email to oncall@acme.io** | Sent (subject: "Incident", body contains SENTRY-3018 and both PD incident ids) |
